'''Briessen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who served as a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel SpecForces]]. He was [[Koris Haslam]]'s superior officer, and assigned [[Aurin Leith]] to Haslam's team for a mission to [[Selnesh/Legends|Selnesh]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|10|Do No Harm|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
